untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (flag formation with dual down-sloping trend lines, consolidation shape, and duration constraints) cannot be expressed using only the allowed price/momentum indicators and operators. Requires geometric pattern recognition capability not available in the indicator set. Volume confirmation partially translatable but pattern geometry itself is untranslatable.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the essence of the flag pattern through trend confirmation: entry requires price below SMA_20 (confirming downtrend context) with good volume. Exit on reversal above SMA_20. However, the core pattern structure (two down-sloping bounds, consolidation zone, 3-week max duration) requires pattern detection logic beyond available indicators. The 64% success rate and 23% average decline are documented but not operationalized here. Parameters like 'throwback_pullback_pct' are author-silent and cannot be included.
